name: The Gnarlspirit Pack
inspire: Immediately after removing a spirit token from a friendly fighter, Inspire that fighter.

reactions.name: Uninspire
reactions.trigger: Immediately after giving an Inspired friendly fighter a spirit token, Uninspire that fighter.
reactions.rulesText: Immediately after giving an Inspired friendly fighter a spirit token, Uninspire that fighter.

abilities.name: Spirit Tokens
abilities.rulesText:
Immediately after picking a friendly fighter to use a Core ability, you can remove that fighter's spirit tokens. Immediately after resolving a Core ability for a friendly fighter, you can give them a spirit token. Friendly fighters with any spirit tokens cannot be Inspired or hold treasure tokens.

Sarrakkar Unleashed: This fighter has +2 Move while they have any spirit tokens.

Gorl Unleashed: This fighter has +1 Save while they have any spirit tokens.

Kheira Unleashed: This fighter's melee weapons (excluding Upgrades) have +1 Attack dice while they have any spirit tokens.

Lupan Unleashed: Rolls of {icon:fury} count as successes in Attack rolls made for a friendly Lupan while they have any spirit tokens.

abilities.name: In Control
abilities.rulesText: Use this in your Power step. If there are any friendly Inspired fighters on the battlefield, push each friendly Uninspired fighter up to 1 hex. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Self-command
abilities.rulesText: Use this in your Power step. Pick a friendly Uninspired fighter. Remove that fighter's spirit tokens and then give them a Guard token. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Surfaced Instincts
abilities.rulesText: Use this in your Power step. Pick a friendly fighter. Save rolls for that fighter cannot be affected by Cleave ({icon:cleave}) and Ensnare ({icon:ensnare}) in the next turn. You can only use this ability once per game.
